name: tracelens
description: A pluggable, human-readable review & scoring layer for LLM traces — make any Langfuse project reviewable by non-engineers.

scripts.verify: node examples/custom-tag-chatbot/verify.ts && node packages/adapter-langfuse/verify.ts && node packages/review-ui/verify.ts && node packages/adapter-langfuse/calibration-verify.ts && node packages/review-ui/calibration-ui-verify.ts && node apps/review-server/calibration-data-verify.ts
